content:
I've noticed something weird with pr_info:

pr_info!("wr {:#08x?} -> {:#06x?} {}\n", self.0, base + $offset, stringify!($name));

prints this text:

[186720.474726] NovaCore: wr 0x000083 -> 0x840188 NV_PFALCON_FALCON_IMEMT

Shouldn't the first hex number be 0x00000083?  It looks like it's printing only 6 hex digits when it should print 8.
Timur Tabi has marked this topic as resolved.
